meta_title: Arcade Machine Gift for Dad: Choosing the Right One
h1: Why a Home Arcade Machine Is the Perfect Gift for Dad
meta_description: A practical guide to choosing a home arcade machine as a gift for dad. What to look for in size, setup ease, game library, and home fit.
og_title: The Home Arcade Gift Your Dad Will Actually Use
og_description: Your dad grew up in arcades. A home arcade brings that feeling back. Here's how to choose the right one as a lasting gift.

excerpt: A guide to choosing a home arcade machine as a meaningful, lasting gift for dad — covering game libraries, setup simplicity, home fit, and how to make the moment memorable.
